datasets.name: slim_tenant_cost
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing),'$.effective_list.default','decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code='USD'
),
base AS (
  SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(p) */
    CAST(CASE WHEN :param_time_key='Week'    THEN DATE_TRUNC('WEEK',    u.usage_date)
              WHEN :param_time_key='Month'   THEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH',   u.usage_date)
              WHEN :param_time_key='Quarter' THEN DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', u.usage_date)
              WHEN :param_time_key='Year'    THEN DATE_TRUNC('YEAR',    u.usage_date)
              ELSE u.usage_date END AS DATE) AS time_key,
    COALESCE(u.custom_tags['tenant'], 'Untagged') AS tenant,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0)) AS cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name=p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=p.usage_unit
    AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
  WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
  GROUP BY 1,2
),
tenant_rank AS (SELECT tenant, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(cost_usd) DESC) AS rn FROM base GROUP BY tenant)
SELECT b.time_key,
       CASE WHEN t.rn <= 10 THEN b.tenant ELSE 'Other (not top-10)' END AS tenant,
       SUM(b.cost_usd) AS cost_usd
FROM base b LEFT JOIN tenant_rank t ON b.tenant=t.tenant
GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY time_key, tenant

datasets.name: slim_cost_overview
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing),'$.effective_list.default','decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code='USD'
),
base AS (
  SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(p) */
    CAST(CASE WHEN :param_time_key='Week'    THEN DATE_TRUNC('WEEK',    u.usage_date)
              WHEN :param_time_key='Month'   THEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH',   u.usage_date)
              WHEN :param_time_key='Quarter' THEN DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', u.usage_date)
              WHEN :param_time_key='Year'    THEN DATE_TRUNC('YEAR',    u.usage_date)
              ELSE u.usage_date END AS DATE) AS time_key,
    u.billing_origin_product,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0)) AS cost_usd,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS dbus
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name=p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=p.usage_unit
    AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
  WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
  GROUP BY 1,2
),
totals AS (SELECT time_key, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost_usd FROM base GROUP BY 1),
ma    AS (SELECT time_key, total_cost_usd,
           AVG(total_cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_key ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma7_cost_usd
          FROM totals)
SELECT b.time_key, b.billing_origin_product, b.cost_usd, b.dbus, m.total_cost_usd, m.ma7_cost_usd
FROM base b JOIN ma m USING (time_key)
ORDER BY time_key, billing_origin_product

datasets.name: slim_cost_kpis
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE, 1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing), '$.effective_list.default', 'decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code = 'USD'
)
SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(p) */
  SUM(CASE WHEN u.usage_date >= DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE) THEN u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0) ELSE 0 END) AS mtd_cost_usd,
  SUM(CASE WHEN u.usage_date >= DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,-7)  THEN u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0) ELSE 0 END) AS trailing_7d_cost_usd,
  SUM(CASE WHEN u.usage_date >= DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,-30) THEN u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0) ELSE 0 END) AS trailing_30d_cost_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN u.usage_date >= DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE) THEN u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0) ELSE 0 END)
    / NULLIF(DAY(CURRENT_DATE),0) * DAY(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE)), 2) AS projected_month_end_usd
FROM system.billing.usage u
LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name=p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=p.usage_unit
  AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,-30)

datasets.name: slim_warehouse_monitor
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing),'$.effective_list.default','decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code='USD'
),
wh_dim AS (
  SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_size,
    CASE WHEN delete_time IS NOT NULL THEN 'deleted' ELSE 'active' END AS wh_status
  FROM system.compute.warehouses
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC)=1
),
wh_cost AS (
  SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(p) */
    u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0)) AS cost_usd,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS dbus
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name=p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=p.usage_unit
    AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
  WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
    AND u.billing_origin_product='SQL'
    AND u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
),
query_raw AS (
  SELECT compute.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    total_duration_ms, execution_duration_ms,
    COALESCE(waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms,0) AS queue_ms,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY compute.warehouse_id, DATE_TRUNC('MINUTE',start_time)) AS queries_in_minute
  FROM system.query.history
  WHERE CAST(start_time AS DATE) BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
    AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
),
query_stats AS (
  SELECT warehouse_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_queries,
    ROUND(AVG(total_duration_ms)/1000.0,1) AS avg_total_secs,
    ROUND(AVG(execution_duration_ms)/1000.0,1) AS avg_exec_secs,
    ROUND(AVG(queue_ms)/1000.0,1) AS avg_queue_secs,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY queue_ms)/1000.0,1) AS p95_queue_secs,
    MAX(queries_in_minute) AS peak_concurrent_approx
  FROM query_raw GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(wc.warehouse_id, wd.warehouse_id) AS warehouse_id,
  COALESCE(wd.warehouse_name, wc.warehouse_id) AS warehouse_name,
  wd.warehouse_size, wd.wh_status,
  COALESCE(wc.cost_usd,0) AS cost_usd,
  COALESCE(wc.dbus,0) AS dbus,
  COALESCE(qs.total_queries,0) AS total_queries,
  COALESCE(qs.avg_total_secs,0) AS avg_total_secs,
  COALESCE(qs.avg_exec_secs,0) AS avg_exec_secs,
  COALESCE(qs.avg_queue_secs,0) AS avg_queue_secs,
  COALESCE(qs.p95_queue_secs,0) AS p95_queue_secs,
  COALESCE(qs.peak_concurrent_approx,0) AS peak_concurrent,
  CASE WHEN qs.peak_concurrent_approx<=1  THEN 'X-Small (1 cluster)'
       WHEN qs.peak_concurrent_approx<=5  THEN 'Small-Medium (autoscale 1-2)'
       WHEN qs.peak_concurrent_approx<=10 THEN 'Large (autoscale 2-4)'
       WHEN qs.peak_concurrent_approx<=20 THEN 'X-Large (autoscale 2-8)'
       ELSE 'Max autoscale (>20 concurrent)' END AS suggested_size,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(qs.peak_concurrent_approx,0)<=2 AND COALESCE(qs.avg_queue_secs,0)<5 THEN 'Potentially oversized'
       WHEN COALESCE(qs.avg_queue_secs,0)>30 THEN 'Queue-bound: scale up'
       WHEN COALESCE(qs.p95_queue_secs,0)>60 THEN 'Occasional queuing: enable autoscale'
       ELSE 'OK' END AS sizing_flag
FROM wh_cost wc
FULL OUTER JOIN wh_dim wd ON wc.warehouse_id=wd.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN query_stats qs ON COALESCE(wc.warehouse_id,wd.warehouse_id)=qs.warehouse_id
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 100

datasets.name: slim_workspace_cost
queryLines:
WITH workspaces AS (
  SELECT workspace_id, COALESCE(workspace_name, CONCAT('id: ',workspace_id)) AS workspace_label
  FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
),
prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing),'$.effective_list.default','decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code='USD'
)
SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(p), BROADCAST(w) */
  CAST(CASE WHEN :param_time_key='Week'    THEN DATE_TRUNC('WEEK',    u.usage_date)
            WHEN :param_time_key='Month'   THEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH',   u.usage_date)
            WHEN :param_time_key='Quarter' THEN DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', u.usage_date)
            WHEN :param_time_key='Year'    THEN DATE_TRUNC('YEAR',    u.usage_date)
            ELSE u.usage_date END AS DATE) AS time_key,
  COALESCE(w.workspace_label, CONCAT('id: ',u.workspace_id)) AS workspace_label,
  u.billing_origin_product,
  SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0)) AS cost_usd,
  SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS dbus
FROM system.billing.usage u
LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON u.workspace_id=w.workspace_id
LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name=p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=p.usage_unit
  AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY time_key, workspace_label

datasets.name: dates_by_options
queryLines:
SELECT
  'Day' AS time_grain
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Week'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Month'

datasets.name: slim_tagging_pct
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT
    sku_name,
    usage_unit,
    price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE, 1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(
      to_variant_object(pricing),
      '$.effective_list.default',
      'decimal(38,18)'
    ) AS unit_px
  FROM
    system.billing.list_prices
  WHERE
    currency_code = 'USD'
)
SELECT
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN
        COALESCE(u.custom_tags['tenant'], 'Untagged') != 'Untagged'
      THEN
        u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px, 0)
      ELSE 0
    END
  )
    / NULLIF(SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px, 0)), 0) AS tagged_pct
FROM
  system.billing.usage u
    LEFT JOIN prices p
      ON u.sku_name = p.sku_name
      AND u.usage_unit = p.usage_unit
      AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
WHERE
  u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max

datasets.name: 6b495274
queryLines:
WITH original_table AS (
    SELECT 
  `time_key` AS time_key,
  MAX(`ma7_cost_usd`) AS ma7_cost_usd
FROM (
    WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing),'$.effective_list.default','decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code='USD'
),
base AS (
  SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(p) */
    CAST(CASE WHEN :param_time_key='Week'    THEN DATE_TRUNC('WEEK',    u.usage_date)
              WHEN :param_time_key='Month'   THEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH',   u.usage_date)
              WHEN :param_time_key='Quarter' THEN DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', u.usage_date)
              WHEN :param_time_key='Year'    THEN DATE_TRUNC('YEAR',    u.usage_date)
              ELSE u.usage_date END AS DATE) AS time_key,
    u.billing_origin_product,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0)) AS cost_usd,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS dbus
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name=p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=p.usage_unit
    AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
  WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
  GROUP BY 1,2
),
totals AS (SELECT time_key, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost_usd FROM base GROUP BY 1),
ma    AS (SELECT time_key, total_cost_usd,
           AVG(total_cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_key ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma7_cost_usd
          FROM totals)
SELECT b.time_key, b.billing_origin_product, b.cost_usd, b.dbus, m.total_cost_usd, m.ma7_cost_usd
FROM base b JOIN ma m USING (time_key)
ORDER BY time_key, billing_origin_product
) GROUP BY 1
  ),
  dates AS (
    SELECT 
      MAX(time_key) AS max_date_column,
      MIN(time_key) AS min_date_column,
      MAX_BY(ma7_cost_usd, time_key) AS ma7_cost_usd
    FROM original_table
  ),
  forecast_table AS (
    SELECT 
      time_key,
      ma7_cost_usd_forecast,
      ma7_cost_usd_upper,
      ma7_cost_usd_lower,
      NULL AS ma7_cost_usd
    FROM AI_FORECAST(
      TABLE(original_table),
      horizon => (
        SELECT
          max_date_column + MAKE_DT_INTERVAL(CAST(FLOOR(DATEDIFF(max_date_column, min_date_column) * 0.5) AS INT), 0, 0, 0)
        FROM dates
      ),
      time_col => 'time_key',
      value_col => 'ma7_cost_usd'
    )
  )

  SELECT * FROM forecast_table
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    time_key,
    NULL AS ma7_cost_usd_forecast,
    NULL AS ma7_cost_usd_upper,
    NULL AS ma7_cost_usd_lower,
    ma7_cost_usd
  FROM original_table
    WHERE time_key < (SELECT max_date_column FROM dates)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    max_date_column AS time_key,
    ma7_cost_usd AS ma7_cost_usd_forecast,
    ma7_cost_usd AS ma7_cost_usd_upper,
    ma7_cost_usd AS ma7_cost_usd_lower,
    ma7_cost_usd
  FROM
    dates

datasets.name: slim_identity_attribution
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing),'$.effective_list.default','decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code='USD'
)
SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(p) */
  COALESCE(u.identity_metadata.run_as, 'Unknown') AS run_as_identity,
  u.billing_origin_product,
  CAST(CASE WHEN :param_time_key='Week'  THEN DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', u.usage_date)
            WHEN :param_time_key='Month' THEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', u.usage_date)
            ELSE u.usage_date END AS DATE) AS time_key,
  SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0)) AS cost_usd,
  SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS dbus
FROM system.billing.usage u
LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name=p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=p.usage_unit
  AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
GROUP BY 1,2,3
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC

datasets.name: slim_tenant_economics
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing),'$.effective_list.default','decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code='USD'
),
cost_by_identity AS (
  SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(p) */
    COALESCE(u.identity_metadata.run_as, 'Unknown') AS run_as_identity,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0)) AS cost_usd,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS dbus
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name=p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=p.usage_unit
    AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
  WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
  GROUP BY 1
),
query_by_identity AS (
  SELECT
    executed_by AS run_as_identity,
    COUNT(*) AS total_queries,
    COUNT(DISTINCT executed_by) AS distinct_users_placeholder
  FROM system.query.history
  WHERE CAST(start_time AS DATE) BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
  GROUP BY 1
),
user_counts AS (
  SELECT
    identity_metadata.run_as AS run_as_identity,
    COUNT(DISTINCT identity_metadata.run_as) AS svc_principal_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT workspace_id) AS workspace_count
  FROM system.billing.usage
  WHERE usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  c.run_as_identity,
  c.cost_usd,
  c.dbus,
  COALESCE(q.total_queries, 0) AS total_queries,
  ROUND(c.cost_usd / NULLIF(q.total_queries, 0) * 1000, 2) AS cost_per_1k_queries,
  ROUND(c.dbus / NULLIF(q.total_queries, 0) * 1000, 2) AS dbus_per_1k_queries,
  COALESCE(uc.workspace_count, 0) AS workspace_count
FROM cost_by_identity c
LEFT JOIN query_by_identity q ON c.run_as_identity = q.run_as_identity
LEFT JOIN user_counts uc ON c.run_as_identity = uc.run_as_identity
ORDER BY c.cost_usd DESC
LIMIT 50

datasets.name: slim_ai_cost
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE,1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing),'$.effective_list.default','decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code='USD'
)
SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(p) */
  CAST(CASE WHEN :param_time_key='Week'  THEN DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', u.usage_date)
            WHEN :param_time_key='Month' THEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', u.usage_date)
            ELSE u.usage_date END AS DATE) AS time_key,
  u.sku_name,
  u.billing_origin_product,
  u.usage_type,
  u.product_features.serving_type AS serving_type,
  CAST(u.product_features.ai_gateway AS STRING) AS ai_gateway_route,
  SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px,0)) AS cost_usd,
  SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS usage_qty,
  u.usage_unit
FROM system.billing.usage u
LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name=p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit=p.usage_unit
  AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
  AND u.billing_origin_product IN ('SERVING', 'AI_GATEWAY', 'FOUNDATION_MODEL_TRAINING', 'MODEL_INFERENCE')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,9
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC

datasets.name: cpq_query_detail
queryLines:
WITH prices AS ( SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time, COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE, 1)) AS price_end_time, try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing), '$.effective_list.default', 'decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code = 'USD' ), warehouse_hour_cost AS ( SELECT u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id, DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', u.usage_end_time) AS usage_hour, SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px, 0)) AS hour_cost_usd, SUM(u.usage_quantity) AS hour_dbus FROM system.billing.usage u LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name = p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit = p.usage_unit AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max AND u.billing_origin_product = 'SQL' AND u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ), query_base AS ( SELECT q.statement_id, q.workspace_id, q.compute.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id, DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', q.start_time) AS query_start_hour, q.start_time, q.end_time, q.executed_by, q.execution_status, q.client_application, q.from_result_cache, COALESCE(q.total_task_duration_ms, q.execution_duration_ms, 0) AS compute_ms, q.execution_duration_ms, q.total_task_duration_ms, COALESCE(q.waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms, 0) AS queue_ms, CASE WHEN q.query_source.job_info.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'JOB' WHEN q.query_source.dashboard_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'DASHBOARD' WHEN q.query_source.notebook_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'NOTEBOOK' WHEN q.query_source.genie_space_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'GENIE' WHEN q.query_source.alert_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'ALERT' WHEN q.query_source.sql_query_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'SAVED_QUERY' ELSE 'DIRECT' END AS query_source_type, COALESCE(q.query_tags['tenant'], q.executed_by) AS tenant_key, CASE WHEN q.query_tags['tenant'] IS NOT NULL THEN 'QUERY_TAG' ELSE 'FALLBACK_IDENTITY' END AS tenant_resolution_method FROM system.query.history q WHERE CAST(q.start_time AS DATE) BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max AND q.compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL ), query_hour_totals AS ( SELECT warehouse_id, query_start_hour, SUM(compute_ms) AS total_compute_ms_in_hour FROM query_base GROUP BY 1, 2 ), warehouse_snapshot AS ( SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, workspace_id, CASE WHEN delete_time IS NOT NULL THEN 'Deleted' ELSE 'Active' END AS is_deleted FROM system.compute.warehouses QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id, warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) = 1 ), cpq AS ( SELECT qb.statement_id, qb.start_time, qb.executed_by, qb.tenant_key, qb.tenant_resolution_method, qb.query_source_type, qb.client_application, qb.execution_status, qb.from_result_cache, qb.execution_duration_ms, qb.total_task_duration_ms, qb.queue_ms, CONCAT(w.warehouse_name, ' (id:', qb.warehouse_id, ')') AS warehouse_name_display, w.is_deleted AS is_warehouse_deleted, CASE WHEN ht.total_compute_ms_in_hour > 0 THEN wh.hour_cost_usd * (qb.compute_ms / ht.total_compute_ms_in_hour) ELSE 0 END AS query_attributed_dollars_estimation, CASE WHEN ht.total_compute_ms_in_hour > 0 THEN wh.hour_dbus * (qb.compute_ms / ht.total_compute_ms_in_hour) ELSE 0 END AS query_attributed_dbus_estimation FROM query_base qb JOIN warehouse_hour_cost wh ON qb.warehouse_id = wh.warehouse_id AND qb.query_start_hour = wh.usage_hour JOIN query_hour_totals ht ON qb.warehouse_id = ht.warehouse_id AND qb.query_start_hour = ht.query_start_hour INNER JOIN warehouse_snapshot w ON qb.workspace_id = w.workspace_id AND qb.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id ) SELECT c.*, c.query_attributed_dollars_estimation * (1 - CAST(:dbsql_discount AS FLOAT)) AS query_attributed_dollars_with_discount, -- HTML data-bar: attributed $ (brand red-orange #FF3621) COALESCE(CONCAT( '
', '
', '$', FORMAT_NUMBER(c.query_attributed_dollars_estimation * (1 - CAST(:dbsql_discount AS FLOAT)), 2), '
'), '--') AS allocated_dollars_bar_html, -- HTML data-bar: attributed DBUs (blue #2166CB) COALESCE(CONCAT( '
', '
', '', FORMAT_NUMBER(c.query_attributed_dbus_estimation, 2), '
'), '--') AS allocated_dbus_bar_html FROM cpq c ORDER BY c.query_attributed_dollars_estimation DESC

datasets.name: cpq_warehouse_stats
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE, 1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing), '$.effective_list.default', 'decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code = 'USD'
),
warehouse_hour_cost AS (
  SELECT u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', u.usage_end_time) AS usage_hour,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px, 0)) AS hour_cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name = p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit = p.usage_unit
    AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
  WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
    AND u.billing_origin_product = 'SQL'
    AND u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
query_base AS (
  SELECT
    q.compute.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    q.workspace_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', q.start_time) AS query_start_hour,
    COALESCE(q.total_task_duration_ms, q.execution_duration_ms, 0) AS compute_ms
  FROM system.query.history q
  WHERE CAST(q.start_time AS DATE) BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
    AND q.compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
),
query_hour_totals AS (
  SELECT warehouse_id, query_start_hour, SUM(compute_ms) AS total_compute_ms_in_hour
  FROM query_base GROUP BY 1, 2
),
warehouse_snapshot AS (
  SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, workspace_id
  FROM system.compute.warehouses
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id, warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) = 1
),
cpq AS (
  SELECT
    CONCAT(w.warehouse_name, ' (id:', qb.warehouse_id, ')') AS warehouse_name_display,
    CASE WHEN ht.total_compute_ms_in_hour > 0
         THEN wh.hour_cost_usd * (qb.compute_ms / ht.total_compute_ms_in_hour)
         ELSE 0
    END AS cost_per_query
  FROM query_base qb
  JOIN warehouse_hour_cost  wh ON qb.warehouse_id = wh.warehouse_id AND qb.query_start_hour = wh.usage_hour
  JOIN query_hour_totals    ht ON qb.warehouse_id = ht.warehouse_id AND qb.query_start_hour = ht.query_start_hour
  INNER JOIN warehouse_snapshot w ON qb.workspace_id = w.workspace_id AND qb.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
)
SELECT
  warehouse_name_display,
  COUNT(*)                                                              AS query_count,
  ROUND(AVG(cost_per_query), 6)                                        AS avg_cost_per_query,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cost_per_query), 6) AS median_cost_per_query,
  ROUND(MAX(cost_per_query), 6)                                        AS max_cost_per_query,
  -- Min excludes zero-cost queries (cache hits / sub-ms) to avoid distorting the floor
  ROUND(MIN(CASE WHEN cost_per_query > 0 THEN cost_per_query END), 6)  AS min_cost_per_query,
  ROUND(SUM(cost_per_query), 4)                                        AS total_attributed_cost
FROM cpq
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY avg_cost_per_query DESC

datasets.name: cpq_wh_stats_chart
queryLines:
WITH prices AS (
  SELECT sku_name, usage_unit, price_start_time,
    COALESCE(price_end_time, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE, 1)) AS price_end_time,
    try_variant_get(to_variant_object(pricing), '$.effective_list.default', 'decimal(38,18)') AS unit_px
  FROM system.billing.list_prices WHERE currency_code = 'USD'
),
warehouse_hour_cost AS (
  SELECT u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', u.usage_end_time) AS usage_hour,
    SUM(u.usage_quantity * COALESCE(p.unit_px, 0)) AS hour_cost_usd
  FROM system.billing.usage u
  LEFT JOIN prices p ON u.sku_name = p.sku_name AND u.usage_unit = p.usage_unit
    AND u.usage_end_time BETWEEN p.price_start_time AND p.price_end_time
  WHERE u.usage_date BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
    AND u.billing_origin_product = 'SQL'
    AND u.usage_metadata.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
query_base AS (
  SELECT
    q.compute.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    q.workspace_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', q.start_time) AS query_start_hour,
    COALESCE(q.total_task_duration_ms, q.execution_duration_ms, 0) AS compute_ms
  FROM system.query.history q
  WHERE CAST(q.start_time AS DATE) BETWEEN :time_range.min AND :time_range.max
    AND q.compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
),
query_hour_totals AS (
  SELECT warehouse_id, query_start_hour, SUM(compute_ms) AS total_compute_ms_in_hour
  FROM query_base GROUP BY 1, 2
),
warehouse_snapshot AS (
  SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, workspace_id
  FROM system.compute.warehouses
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id, warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) = 1
),
cpq AS (
  SELECT
    CONCAT(w.warehouse_name, ' (id:', qb.warehouse_id, ')') AS warehouse_name_display,
    CASE WHEN ht.total_compute_ms_in_hour > 0
         THEN wh.hour_cost_usd * (qb.compute_ms / ht.total_compute_ms_in_hour)
         ELSE 0
    END AS cost_per_query
  FROM query_base qb
  JOIN warehouse_hour_cost  wh ON qb.warehouse_id = wh.warehouse_id AND qb.query_start_hour = wh.usage_hour
  JOIN query_hour_totals    ht ON qb.warehouse_id = ht.warehouse_id AND qb.query_start_hour = ht.query_start_hour
  INNER JOIN warehouse_snapshot w ON qb.workspace_id = w.workspace_id AND qb.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    warehouse_name_display,
    ROUND(AVG(cost_per_query), 6)                                         AS avg_val,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cost_per_query), 6) AS median_val,
    ROUND(MAX(cost_per_query), 6)                                         AS max_val,
    ROUND(MIN(CASE WHEN cost_per_query > 0 THEN cost_per_query END), 6)   AS min_val
  FROM cpq
  GROUP BY 1
)
-- Unpivot: one row per (warehouse, metric), sorted so avg appears first in legend
SELECT warehouse_name_display, 'Average'        AS metric, avg_val    AS cost_per_query, avg_val AS sort_key FROM stats
UNION ALL
SELECT warehouse_name_display, 'Median'         AS metric, median_val, avg_val FROM stats
UNION ALL
SELECT warehouse_name_display, 'Max'            AS metric, max_val,    avg_val FROM stats
UNION ALL
SELECT warehouse_name_display, 'Min (non-zero)' AS metric, min_val,    avg_val FROM stats
ORDER BY sort_key DESC, warehouse_name_display, metric

lines:
# Cost Overview
---
List price only · default 30-day window · Day/Week/Month grain toggle

**Assumptions**
* Tenant tag key: `custom_tags['tenant']` — update slim_tenant_cost SQL to match your actual key
* Pricing: list price only (system.billing.list_prices). No discount applied.
* Default window: rolling 30 days. Extend via Time Window filter (≤90 days recommended).
* Warehouse concurrency: approximated as max queries started in any 60-second bucket.
* Month-end projection: linear (MTD ÷ days elapsed × days in month).

# Cost by Tenant
---
Tenant attribution uses `custom_tags['tenant']`. [How to tag compute resources →](https://docs.databricks.com/en/administration-guide/account-settings/usage-detail-tags.html)

## Attribution Fallback: by Identity
---
Uses `identity_metadata.run_as` (service principal / Entra group) as a proxy for tenant attribution while tag coverage is low. Map your `client-<tenant_id>` service principals below.

## Cost per Query
---
Compute-time-share attribution · discount-adjusted · ordered by attributed cost

# Tenant Unit Economics
---
Cost per identity · cost per 1k queries · DBUs per 1k queries — use to set volume-based pricing with margin

# AI & Gateway Cost
---
Serving, AI Gateway, Foundation Model Training, Model Inference · by SKU, usage type, and serving type
